ddls:
CREATE TABLE "whale_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each whale sighting */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the whale sighting */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the whale species */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the whale was sighted */,
  "num_whales" INTEGER /* Number of whales sighted */,
  "sighting_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sighting */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who reported the sighting */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research vessel used for the sighting */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sighting */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature at the sighting location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the sighting */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the sighting */,
  "sighting_method" TEXT /* Method used for the sighting (e.g., visual, acoustic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whale_sightings_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whale_sightings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES whale_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whale_sightings_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES research_vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whale_sightings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "whale_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each whale species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the whale species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the whale species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the whale species */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the species */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "migration_patterns" TEXT /* Migration patterns of the species */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "reproductive_rate" TEXT /* Reproductive rate of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the location */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature at the location */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level at the location */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the research vessel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research vessel */,
  "crew_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum crew capacity of the research vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., research, exploration) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the vessel */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the vessel */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the vessel */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acoustic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acoustic data point */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the acoustic data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "whale_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the whale species detected */,
  "acoustic_reading" REAL /* Acoustic reading value */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research vessel used for data collection */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who collected the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_whale_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("whale_species_id") REFERENCES whale_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES research_vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., acoustic, temperature) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the sensor in hours */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data accessed (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES acoustic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "lead_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the lead investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("lead_investigator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., principal investigator, researcher) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the participant's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the participant's involvement */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the participant's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation text */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of citation */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the citation was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES data_publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "whale_conservation" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation effort */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the whale species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the whale species */,
  "conservation_date" TEXT /* Date of conservation effort */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the species */,
  "conservation_plan" TEXT /* Conservation plan for the species */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for conservation efforts */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whale_conservation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES whale_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation action */,
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation effort */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation action (e.g., habitat protection, research) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of conservation action */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the conservation action */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the action */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the conservation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_actions_conservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conservation_id") REFERENCES whale_conservation ("conservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research grant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the research grant */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date of research grant */,
  "granting_agency" TEXT /* Agency that awarded the grant */,
  "grant_title" TEXT /* Title of the grant */,
  "grant_status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., awarded, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_grants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
